system.name: SPY Options Validation Platform
system.tagline: Broker-backed scorecards, hard risk gates, paired-trade accounting, and live operator surfaces.

gate.blocker_reason: Negative lifetime expectancy freezes North Star claims; only minimum-size paper validation is allowed because a valid changed-rule hypothesis is present.

narrative.summary: Latest tracked broker sync shows $-26.00 today with 8 open paper positions. Use the operator scorecard for realized/unrealized and leg-level decomposition.
narrative.thesis: This project is currently a paper-first validation platform, not a proven passive-income engine. Public surfaces should show current gate state and broker-backed evidence rather than frozen claims.
